title: Marketing Communications Specialist
required_skills: 2-4 years in marketing communications, sales support, or B2B marketing
University degree in marketing, communications, business or related field
Strong presentation and layout skills (Canva, PowerPoint)
Attention to detail with technical/investment-related content
bonus_skills: Financial services, asset management, ETFs, or professional services experience
CMS platforms, email marketing tools, basic analytics
matched_skills: Master's degree in Management & Entrepreneurship (business/marketing focus)
3+ years B2B marketing (IPC, GRG Banking, Moli Media)
PowerPoint — explicitly advanced in CV and central to all roles
Sales collateral and client-facing materials (IPC, GRG Banking — pitchbooks, demo scripts, product guides)
Trade fair and event coordination (IPC, GRG Banking)
missing_skills: Canva (not in CV — PowerPoint is present)
Financial services / ETF / index industry knowledge
CMS / email marketing tools (not in CV)
core_responsibilities: Own marketing and communications production in Frankfurt
Translate business inputs into polished, client-ready outputs
Produce client presentations, pitch decks, factsheets, brochures
Support global events and conferences with collateral
Produce website content, newsletters, and thought-leadership updates
recommended_emphasis: Lead with sales collateral and B2B marketing materials experience (IPC, GRG Banking)
Highlight PowerPoint as primary tool — central to this role
C-level reporting and executive presentation work from HSBC is a strong fit
Trade fair execution and product launch collateral are direct matches
Note Chinese C2 — VanEck is global and this is a unique language asset
Financial services/ETF gap — position as quick learner with analytical business background

company_info.size_raw: MarketVector Indexes GmbH — VanEck company, specialized index provider
